remaining_params.SpellDescription: Monstrosity X, where X is the number of counters among creatures you control. (If this creature isn't monstrous, put X +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes monstrous.)

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to CARDNAME's power on another target creature you control.
